sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 30

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 30:1
items.html: (to the question) For the matter of the ascent of the Hey Tachtona [lower Hey] into the Hey Rishona [first Hey] does not govern at all in the GAR of Bina, as is known, but in the ZAT [seven lower ones] of Bina. Thus there is here no discernment of going outside, below the second Tzimtzum [restriction], except for the ZON of Bina and the collective ZON; the discernments of GAR are not included in this Tzimtzum at all. And it is known that the essence of ZON is only its NHY [Netzah, Hod, Yesod] alone, for HGT [Hesed, Gevura, Tiferet] are discernments of GAR of Hassadim, drawn from the GAR of Bina; hence they too are counted above the second Tzimtzum. Thus the essential departure of the AHP [Awzen, Hotem, Peh] governs only the NHY alone. (p. 775, beginning "Achoraim")
